channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-15 15:58 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Episode 172 Part 1 is live! Fresh off the plane from Dubai, Zuby (@ZubyMusic) has his first supervis...
item.description: Episode 172 Part 1 is live! Fresh off the plane from Dubai, Zuby (@ZubyMusic) has his first supervised FSD ride in Austin. He discusses his global experiences and the biggest myth about masculinity. Drop a listen ❤️ (Pt 2 soon!)

item.title: @elonmusk: all of their ideas now are like “should we dissolve the government, imprison our opponents, and seiz...
item.description: all of their ideas now are like “should we dissolve the government, imprison our opponents, and seize every lever of power in the country? we’re the good guys remember, if we don’t do this the bad guys will win (an election)” like they don’t even talk about healthcare anymore lol

item.title: @elonmusk: Please list the most important features to improve, fix or add in the replies below:
item.description: Please list the most important features to improve, fix or add in the replies below:

item.title: @elonmusk: Holy shit I’m going to need another Grok Heavy account. Grok Build is god-tier 👌
item.description: Holy shit I’m going to need another Grok Heavy account. Grok Build is god-tier 👌

item.title: @elonmusk: Go in with expectations that Grok Build is still beta, but improving almost every day
item.description: Go in with expectations that Grok Build is still beta, but improving almost every day

item.title: @elonmusk: The latest 𝕏 algorithm has been published to GitHubgithub.com/xai-org/x-algorit…
item.description: The latest 𝕏 algorithm has been published to GitHubgithub.com/xai-org/x-algorit…

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 just open sourced the latest recommendation algorithm on GitHub 𝕏 is the only major social platfor...
item.description: 𝕏 just open sourced the latest recommendation algorithm on GitHub 𝕏 is the only major social platform in the world to publicly open source its core recommendation algorithm It is by far the most transparent social platform in the world right nowgithub.com/xai-org/x-algorit…

item.title: @elonmusk: 40 Grok Build agents tearing through C code in parallel. All supervised by DAD. DAD is a lightweight...
item.description: 40 Grok Build agents tearing through C code in parallel. All supervised by DAD. DAD is a lightweight autonomous tmux supervisor for long-running Grok tasks. Built entirely in Grok Build. /dad "your objective" launches grok --yolo (the Son) and spins up two loops: 2-min fast loop: nudges only when the Son is stuck, frozen, finished, or waiting. Hands off in Plan mode. 12-min deep loop: re-reads the objective, pushes back if the Son lowers the bar, triggers /compact at ~50% context. Re-attachable. Walk back to a DAD-* window hours later and Dad rehydrates the loops. Set and forget. Dad watches, the Son works.

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 just open-sourced its For You algorithm. This is one of the biggest transparency moves from any so...
item.description: 𝕏 just open-sourced its For You algorithm. This is one of the biggest transparency moves from any social platform. Here’s the Grok breakdown:

item.title: @elonmusk: Critique of the 𝕏 algorithm is welcome. There will be monthly updates of the latest algorithm to Git...
item.description: Critique of the 𝕏 algorithm is welcome. There will be monthly updates of the latest algorithm to GitHub with release notes. As reminder, you can always choose no algorithm via the Following tab.

item.title: @elonmusk: Only 𝕏 is open, the other social media companies manipulate the results behind closed doors
item.description: Only 𝕏 is open, the other social media companies manipulate the results behind closed doors

item.title: @elonmusk: Beware the empathy exploit. Empathy is good and right when thought through (deep), but can be deadly...
item.description: Beware the empathy exploit. Empathy is good and right when thought through (deep), but can be deadly to civilization when simply stimulus-response (shallow). For example, releasing a repeat violent offender may feel good at first (shallow empathy for the criminal), but it is wrong to do so when that person will go on to hurt or murder innocent victims, as there should be deep empathy for future victims.

item.title: @elonmusk: The goal of the 𝕏 algorithm is simple: show each user the content they are most likely to find inter...
item.description: The goal of the 𝕏 algorithm is simple: show each user the content they are most likely to find interesting, limited only by the laws within a given jurisdiction. No thumb on the scale. Doesn’t mean we achieve the goal, but that is what I tell the team.
